---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability or improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What pain point or use case does this address?

## Proposed solution

What you'd like to see. Be as concrete as possible — API shape, config keys, or screenshots help.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about and why this one is preferred.

## Additional context

Links, prior art, or anything else relevant.
